user.title: Matrix Server
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to your Matrix homeserver.

data_description.account_label: Short name for this account. Used as prefix in service names (lowercase letters, digits, underscores only).

credentials_token.title: Access Token
credentials_token.description: You can find your access token in your Matrix client under Settings → Security → Sessions.

rooms.title: Matrix Rooms
rooms.description: Rooms are optional. Bridge accounts (WhatsApp, Signal, Telegram) do not need rooms – the 'Send direct message' service is sufficient.

data.enable_sync: Enable background sync (required to receive replies)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Matrix server. Please check the URL and credentials.
error.invalid_label: The label may only contain lowercase letters, digits, and underscores, and must start with a letter or digit (e.g. 'marc').

abort.already_configured: This Matrix instance is already configured.
